title: Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur
tagline: Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Agnipureeswarar Temple (also called Thirupugalur temple) in Thirupugalur, a village in Nagapattinam district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god
overview.description: Agnipureeswarar Temple (also called Thirupugalur temple) in Thirupugalur, a village in Nagapattinam district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva. Constructed in the Tamil style of architecture, the temple is believed to have been built during the Cholas period in the 10th century. Shiva is worshipped as Agnipureeswarar and his consort Parvathi as Karundar Kuzhali. A granite wall surrounds the temple, enclosing all its shrines.

topPlaces.name: Ramanathaswami Temple, Tiruvarur
topPlaces.description: Ramanathaswami Temple (Tamil: திருக்கண்ணபுரம் இராமனதீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirukannapuram in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. Dedicated to Shiva, the temple is located in the village of Tirukannapuram between Tiruvarur and Mayiladuthurai.

topPlaces.name: Thirukannapuram
topPlaces.description: Thirukannapuram is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, Nagapattinam District. A popular Perumal temple (Neelamegha Perumal temple) is there.

topPlaces.name: Neelamegha Perumal Temple
topPlaces.description: The Neelamegha Perumal Temple or Sowriraja Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple in Thirukannapuram, a village in the outskirts of Nagapattinam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Divya Prabandha, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Neelamegha Perumal (also called as Neela Meghar) and his consort Lakshmi as Thirukannapura Nayagi.

topPlaces.name: Polagam, Karaikal
topPlaces.description: Polagam is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 8 kilometres south-west of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres south of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

topPlaces.name: Uthrapathiswaraswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Uthrapathiswaraswamy Temple is a Hindu temple in Tiruchenkattankudi in Nagapattinam district in the Tamil Nadu state of India. Though it is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva, it is more famous for its Ganesha (Ganapati) icons.

topPlaces.name: Tiruchenkattankudi Uthirapasupatheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Tiruchenkattankudi Uthirapasupatheeswarar Temple ( Tamil: திருச்செங்காட்டங்குடி உத்தராபதீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tiruchengattankudi in Nagapattinam District, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Ganapatheesaram.

topPlaces.name: Enangudi
topPlaces.description: Enangudi is the main village which is unified with neighbouring villages like Adalaiyur, Karipakkam, Ketharimangalam, Putthagaram, Kayathoor, Karuppuoor, Thepiramangalam, Vawvaladi and Pakkam Kottor. The nearest town of significant size is Tiruvarur which is 16 km away, Mayiladuthurai is 30 km and Nagapattinam is around 28 km away.

topPlaces.name: Adhalaiyur
topPlaces.description: Adhalaiyur is a village in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu State of India.

Thirukannapuram is a village in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, Nagapattinam District. A popular Perumal temple (Neelamegha Perumal temple) is there.

The Neelamegha Perumal Temple or Sowriraja Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple in Thirukannapuram, a village in the outskirts of Nagapattinam in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Divya Prabandha, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Neelamegha Perumal (also called as Neela Meghar) and his consort Lakshmi as Thirukannapura Nayagi.

Polagam is a revenue village in the Karaikal taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated at a distance of about 8 kilometres south-west of Karaikal town and 2 kilometres south of Tirumalarajanpattinam commune.

Uthrapathiswaraswamy Temple is a Hindu temple in Tiruchenkattankudi in Nagapattinam district in the Tamil Nadu state of India. Though it is dedicated to the Hindu god Shiva, it is more famous for its Ganesha (Ganapati) icons.

Tiruchenkattankudi Uthirapasupatheeswarar Temple ( Tamil: திருச்செங்காட்டங்குடி உத்தராபதீசுவரர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Tiruchengattankudi in Nagapattinam District, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Ganapatheesaram.

Enangudi is the main village which is unified with neighbouring villages like Adalaiyur, Karipakkam, Ketharimangalam, Putthagaram, Kayathoor, Karuppuoor, Thepiramangalam, Vawvaladi and Pakkam Kottor. The nearest town of significant size is Tiruvarur which is 16 km away, Mayiladuthurai is 30 km and Nagapattinam is around 28 km away.
Adhalaiyur is a village in Nagapattinam district in Tamil Nadu State of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (109 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (111 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur?
faq.a: Stays in Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Agnipureeswarar Temple, Thirupugalur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ramanathaswami Temple, Tiruvarur, Thirukannapuram, Neelamegha Perumal Temple, Polagam, Karaikal, Uthrapathiswaraswamy Temple.
